hero.subheading: Learn programming from scratch to professional level. Reach your goals with real projects, experienced mentors, and career support.

about_section.title: We are educating the
about_section.description: We create an innovative and accessible learning environment for everyone who wants to build a successful career in the technology world. We help you reach your goals with modern teaching methodologies and professional mentors.
about_section.mission_desc: To provide programming education at global standards.
about_section.vision_desc: To prepare leading experts in the technology field.

methodology.title: How We Prepare the
methodology.description: Our teaching method is not just about teaching how to write code, it's also about forming an engineering mindset.

features.title: Practice-Based Learning
features.desc: Master coding deeply by combining theory with real-world projects.

features.title: Mentor Support
features.desc: Get individual feedback and constant guidance from professional programmers.

features.title: Algorithmic Thinking
features.desc: Develop your analytical skills to solve complex problems.

why_choose_us.title: Why Choose Us?
why_choose_us.description: We don't just teach coding, we prepare you to be a technology leader. Our method is focused on results.

features.title: International Certificate
features.desc: Get an internationally recognized certificate after successful completion and strengthen your CV.

features.title: Career Support
features.desc: Start your career strong with interview prep, CV design, and job opportunities in partner companies.

features.title: Strong Community
features.desc: Join an active community of experienced developers and students, find answers to your questions instantly.

features.title: Real Projects
features.desc: Don't settle for theory. Gain experience by working on real-world projects for your portfolio.

features.title: Mentor Support
features.desc: Connect directly with professional mentors who will guide you every step of the way.

features.title: Lifetime Access
features.desc: Get lifetime access to lessons and updated materials. Your learning never stops.
